title: Lesson 46
paragraph: This lesson practices useful nouns for rooms and home life.

words.meaning: a room where people cook food
words.example: My mother is in the kitchen.

words.meaning: a room with a toilet or bath
words.example: The bathroom is next to my room.
My bedroom has a small desk.

words.meaning: a room where family or guests sit
words.example: We watch TV in the living room.

words.meaning: steps that go up or down in a building
words.example: Use the stairs to go to the second floor.

words.meaning: the top part of a house or building
the part of a room that you walk on
the top inside part of a room
the side part of a room or building
words.example: There is a picture on the wall.
The children play in the yard.
